Gift Card

Regular price $50.00
More stock coming soon
By Unrecorded

Sustainability as standard. We choose the right fabrics to create the best products. Read more

Denominations
0 in stock
200 characters max

Gift Card - US$50.00 is backordered and will ship as soon as it is back in stock.

Description
Shopping for someone else, but not sure what to give them? Give them the gift of choice with a E-Gift Card.

Once purchased, you will receive an email with the card details and instructions on how to redeem at checkout. Valid online only.

Please note: All e-gift card purchases are final sale and non-refundable. E-gift cards cannot be applied to existing orders.
Materials & Care

Our cotton is grown on soil that is free of toxic pesticides and fertilizers. Our fabric is dyed and finished without the use of heavy metals or allergenic disperse dyes.

- Wash at 30 degrees with similar colours
- Lay flat to dry
- Iron on the inside if necessary
Shipping

- To DE/FR/BE/LU/AT/DK/UK €9 (free above €100)
- To rest of EU €15 (free above €150)
- To rest of Europe €25 (free above €200)
- To rest of World €35 (free above €300)

Salt Yard has a 14-day return policy: any unwanted items needs to be shipped within 14 days of receipt. After the product is returned you will be refunded.Salt Yard will issue a full refund including the original shipping cost. The return shipping fee will not be refunded.
